title: clinopodium plicatulum
intro: Clinopodium plicatulum, also known as mountain mint, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium plicatulum include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be used fresh in herbal infusions or dried for later use.
